tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.3%), indicating impaired glucose tolerance or possible early diabetes. Renal function and electrolytes are normal. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of lifestyle modification or further evaluation for diabetes management.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Civile di Voghera
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
